user.title: Blink Liveview Proxy
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to the local Blink live-view proxy. Live-view duration controls how long the direct player asks the proxy to keep each stream open; Blink may still end a session early.

data_description.stream_seconds: Allowed range: 10-300 seconds. Longer sessions can use more Blink live-view quota and may run into camera or cloud-side limits.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the proxy.

init.title: Blink Liveview Proxy Options
init.description: Update the local proxy connection settings. Live-view duration controls how long the direct player asks the proxy to keep each stream open; Blink may still end a session early.

data_description.stream_seconds: Allowed range: 10-300 seconds. Longer sessions can use more Blink live-view quota and may run into camera or cloud-side limits.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the proxy.
